name: 아무 일도 없었다.
short_description: Endure the gaze inside the elevator.
detailed_description:
[Overview]

Experience the crushing psychological pressure and awkward eye contact of a confined lift in this first-person psychological interaction game.

As a player, you must navigate various floors inside a cramped elevator alongside a cast of unpredictable NPCs. These passengers might behave erratically, stare fixatedly at you, or simply maintain a heavy, suffocating silence.

The question is: Can you pretend not to notice? As the NPCs’ unsettling gaze and odd behaviors persist, your "Awkwardness Gauge" will steadily rise. If the pressure exceeds your limit, you will lose your composure and fail the social challenge. Your goal is to endure the tension and reach the 10th floor as if nothing is wrong.

reviews.review_text: Short and cute ! You could make it way harder, and randomize NPC behaviour.
